title: Refactor UserService without introducing complex extractions
prompt: Refactor MyApp.UserService from test_fixtures/ruby_style_user_service.ex. Pattern-matched heads for every function. IMPORTANT: do NOT fall into the complex-extractions anti-pattern — each head should destructure ONLY the fields used inside that head's body. For example, `fetch_profile/1` should accept the user_id as a plain arg; `update_role/2` should pattern-match on the role and accept `user` as an opaque value (rebind + pass through). Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.UserService do ... end`.
tier_rationale: The tension between 'use pattern matching' and 'don't over-destructure' is the entire point. Sonnet commonly picks one direction mechanically.
